title: User can log in with email and password
description: As a registered user, I want to log in with my email address and password so that I can access my dashboard and personalized features. Login must be available from the marketing site header ("Sign in") and from the deep-linked /login route. The session must persist across page reloads via an httpOnly cookie. MFA is out of scope for this story and is tracked separately under PROJ-456.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid registered email and password, when the user submits the login form, then they are redirected to /dashboard within 2 seconds.
Given an invalid password for a valid email, when the user submits, then an inline error 'Email or password is incorrect' is shown and the password field is cleared (email field preserved).
Given an unknown email, when the user submits, then the same generic inline error is shown (do not leak account existence).
Given a locked account (5+ failed attempts in 15 minutes), when the user submits, then an inline error 'Account temporarily locked' is shown with a 'Reset password' link.
Given an empty email or password field, when the user submits, then client-side validation messages appear and the form is not submitted.
Given a successful login, when the user reloads the page, then they remain authenticated.
